name: TQM Corporation Public Company Limited
summary: TQM Corporation Public Company Limited engages in the insurance brokerage business in Thailand. The company offers life and non-life insurance products that include car, travel, accident, health, life, home, motorbike, and influenza and dengue insurance. It also provides IT and software services. The company is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand. TQM Corporation Public Company Limited is a subsidiary of Eternal Growth Corporation Company Limited.
